working_on.task: Debate system verified with live runs. Timeout tuned, handoff cleanup done.
working_on.notes: System stable. Last live debate completed successfully.

Spec reviewed by Codex. File viewer with syntax highlighting, IDE links, XSS safety.

recent_changes.description: Increased Claude Code agent timeout for debates — prevents premature timeout during deep analysis (reviews take 2-5 min)
Ran live debate with Codex + Claude Code on extension-hub.js. Cross-evaluation and consensus working.
Refined handoff artifact cleanup — only latest.* files retained. Integrated into session finalization.
Ran debate with two agents (Codex + Claude Code). Validated cross-evaluation flow end-to-end.

Fixed 7 debate findings: debate_failed→failed (P0), activeSessions memory leak (P0), adapter validation (P1), turnToken passthrough (P1), REST debate gating (P2), expire state recovery (P2), shutdown wait for debates (P3)
Deleted unused data/ and handoff/ folders. Cleaned project structure.
Full codebase review via both agents. Codex and Claude Code each provided findings on extension-hub code quality.
Deployed instructions from huong_dan.md to multiple machines.
Updated local repo — git pull latest changes from remote.

errors_encountered.solution: File renamed to claude-code-adapter.js. Updated import path and class name.

errors_encountered.error: Claude Code agent timeout during debate
errors_encountered.solution: Increased hard timeout from 300s to 600s. Reviews take 2-5 min for deep analysis.

decisions_made.decision: Fix all P0+P1 findings immediately, P2+P3 in same session
decisions_made.reason: P0 bugs could cause data corruption. P1 bugs caused silent failures.
Unused profiles exist but don't affect runtime. Low risk.

decisions_made.decision: blockIfDebateActive on REST routes mirrors MCP gating
decisions_made.reason: REST routes were unprotected while MCP tools had getDebateGatingBlock.

decisions_made.decision: Increase Claude Code timeout for debates
decisions_made.reason: Default was too short. Deep analysis reviews take 2-5 minutes.

decisions_made.decision: Only keep latest.* in handoff artifacts
decisions_made.reason: History is noise. Only latest matters for resuming work.
